title: What are your goals for the week? #173
author: Chris Jarvis
summary:
It's full on Spring here. Stuff is blooming and things are covered in pollen. Our sprouts are getting big and it's almost time to move them to the soil.
Thanks for the conversation on this post last week. It helped me earn the #Discuss badge for "the top weekly post under the #discuss tag."

What are your goals for the week?

  • What are you building this week?
  • What do you want to learn?
  • What events are you attending this week?

This Week's Goals.

  • Job Search.
    • Network
    • Apply
  • Project work.
    • Content for side project.
    • Work on my own project.
  • Update my Content & Project Calendar for April. Looking at it no there's no events listed the rest of the month. That's odd. new to check emails and see if I forgot to add stuff to the calendar.
  • Blog
  • Events.
    • Thursday Virtual Coffee
    • ?
full_text:
It's full on Spring here. Stuff is blooming and things are covered in pollen. Our sprouts are getting big and it's almost time to move them to the soil.

Thanks for the conversation on this post last week. It helped me earn the #Discuss badge for "the top weekly post under the #discuss tag."

 
 
 What are your goals for the week?

What are you building this week?

What do you want to learn?

What events are you attending this week?

 
 
 This Week's Goals.

Job Search.

Project work.

Content for side project.

Work on my own project.

Update my Content & Project Calendar for April. Looking at it no there's no events listed the rest of the month. That's odd. new to check emails and see if I forgot to add stuff to the calendar.

Blog

Events.

Thursday Virtual Coffee

?

Run a goal setting thread on Virtual Coffee(VC) Slack.

 
 
 How I did last week.

Job Search.

Project work.

✅ Content for side project.

✅ Work on my own project.

✅ Update Content & Project Calendar for April.

✅ 

Blog Made some CSS Easter Eggs and blogged about them.

Earned the #Discuss Badge for last week's edition of this series. "Awarded for sharing the top weekly post under the #discuss tag." Thanks for the great conversation.

Events.

❌ Thursday Virtual Coffee

✅ Friday attend a Lunch and Learn

✅ Run a goal setting thread on Virtual Coffee(VC) Slack.

 

 
 
 Your turn, what do you plan to do this week?

What are you building this week?

What do you want to learn?

What events are you attending this week?

Cover image is my LEGO photography. It's Daffy Duck working at a desktop computer. In the background is a mini rubber duck.
